sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useParams, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import api from '../api'; import './StudentDashboard.css'; // Reuse dashboard styles for cards/charts export default function StudentInsights() { const { studentId } = useParams(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const [student, setStudent] = useState(null); const [results, setResults] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); const [selectedResult, setSelectedResult] = useState(null); useEffect(() => { Promise.all([ api.get(`/users/${studentId}`), api.get(`/results/student/${studentId}`) ]) .then(([userRes, resRes]) => { setStudent(userRes.data); setResults(resRes.data); }) .catch(err => { console.error(err); }) .finally(() => setLoading(false)); }, [studentId]); if (loading) return
Loading student data...
; if (!student) return
Student not found.
; return (

{student.name}'s Profile

{student.course} • {student.department} • Roll: {student.rollNumber}

Active Student
Assignments Taken
{results.length}
Average Score
{results.length ? Math.round(results.reduce((a, b) => a + b.percentage, 0) / results.length) : 0}%
Recent Score
{results[0]?.percentage || 0}%

Assignment History

{results.map((r) => ( ))} {results.length === 0 && ( )}
Assignment Subject Score Date Upload
setSelectedResult(r)} > {r.assessment?.title || 'Assignment'} {r.subject?.name || r.subject || 'N/A'} {r.percentage}% {r.completedAt ? new Date(r.completedAt).toLocaleDateString() : '—'}
No assignment data available for this student.
{selectedResult && (
setSelectedResult(null)}>
e.stopPropagation()}>

Assignment Result

{selectedResult.subject?.name || selectedResult.subject}
{selectedResult.assessment?.title}
{selectedResult.percentage}%
{new Date(selectedResult.completedAt).toLocaleString()}

Performance Breakdown

Student answered {selectedResult.score} correct out of {selectedResult.totalQuestions} questions.

)}
); }
